LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF TROY SILVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO DISMISS UNCERTIFIED CLASS ACTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN, THE CLASS ACTION CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COURT SIGNED THE ORDER THAT WAS EMAILED TO THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Leave To Dismiss Uncertified Class Action
Off Calendar Mar-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF TROY SILVA's Motion For Leave To Dismiss Uncertified Class Action is Granted. Defendant filed a statement of non-opposition. For good cause shown, the class action causes of action of the first amended complaint are dismissed without prejudice. Court signed the order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
